  - task: DotNetCoreCLI@2
    displayName: 'Run unit tests with coverage'
    inputs:
      command: 'test'
      projects: '$(testProjects)'
      arguments: '--configuration $(buildConfiguration) --logger trx --results-directory "$(testResultsDir)" /p:CollectCoverage=true /p:CoverletOutput="$(Agent.TempDirectory)/coverage.opencover.xml" /p:CoverletOutputFormat=opencover'
      publishTestResults: false


Add unit test coverage generation for SonarQube analysis
